cross_task.validates: measured 3-D thermal-field decomposition on real facade geometry (ladder rung 2)

fused_3d.note: measured 3-D thermal field (calibrated °C) on real facade geometry. A geometry-local smoother explains smooth_explained_frac of the field; the anomaly residual is the localized heat-loss an operator with known materials, or the inverse twin, must recover. Absolute scale unconstrained (T_in/T_out not in the dataset), so rel-L2 is on the mean-removed field.

metrics.note: physics-motivated heat-loss saliency vs annotated bridges; enrichment > 1 beats random

cross_task.validates: airborne IR heat-loss localisation on the modelled CityGML envelopes

metrics.note: relative (tone-mapped) thermal; enrichment > 1 ⇒ measured heat-loss anomalies concentrate on the CityGML building envelopes we model
